reviews.comment:
Siempre voy a cargar combustible y tomar un muy buen café , pero los baños cerrados y me dijeron que pida la llave  al playero y no me la dio y tuve que discutir y intervino el encargado del shop y terminamos mal , el playero me atendió muy mal y de mala manera , faltó poca para que tuviera que orinar por la pared o un surtidor de combustible , una vergüenza total ,

(Translated by Google)
I always go there to fill up and get a really good coffee, but the restrooms were closed and they told me to ask the attendant for the key, but he wouldn't give it to me and I had to argue. The shop manager intervened and it ended badly. The attendant treated me very badly and rudely; I almost had to urinate against the wall or a fuel pump. A total disgrace.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9489607436873459405/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR1NG9HVHd3RRAB
